global.description: The ad features a modern design with a focus on the NeonCast brand and a clear call to action.
global.visual_style: bright and modern with abstract elements
global.main_message: Promoting the NeonCast service with a trending message and a call to action.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: A collection of abstract shapes including a circle and a square, rendered in a light blue color.

elements.label: NeonCast logo
elements.description: A bold, modern logo with the text 'NeonCast' prominently displayed in a contrasting color against a blue background.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: A small, circular decorative element in a muted color, positioned towards the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: Another small decorative element, this time a square shape, in a similar muted color.

elements.label: Trending message
elements.description: Text that reads 'Watch what's trending Cancel anytime' in a bold, easy-to-read font, centered at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The main headline 'NeonCast' in large, bold letters at the top of the ad, creating a strong focal point.

elements.label: Order now button
elements.description: A prominent call-to-action button with the text 'Order now' in a contrasting color, located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: UGC icon
elements.description: A small icon labeled 'UGC' in a circular shape, positioned at the top left corner of the ad.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by abstract shapes, with body text and CTA at the bottom.
